message:
test(api,conformance): add transform API unit tests and JVP numerical verification

Add comprehensive unit tests to fj-api/transforms.rs covering: jit,
grad, vmap, value_and_grad, jacobian, hessian constructor defaults,
builder methods (with_backend, with_mode, with_argnums), and basic
execution for add/mul jaxprs. Add smallvec dev-dependency.

Add jvp_numerical_verification.rs conformance test with finite-
difference JVP checks for Cholesky, QR, and SVD primitives, verifying
tangent outputs match (f(x+e*dx) - f(x-e*dx)) / 2e.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
